description: Real error examples from Anthropic Claude API for reference

errors.raw_error: API Error: 401 ("type":"error","error" ("type"."authentication_error", message"."OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token.","request_id":"req_011CUp5WQxZAVPq6593o1spz")

error.message: OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token.

handling.user_message: API authentication failed. The API key may be expired or invalid. Please contact the system administrator to update the API key.

notes: Error is thrown by Claude SDK when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is expired or invalid
Error structure has type='error' and error.type='authentication_error'
